sql_array: CREATE TABLE example_arrays (id INTEGER, l1 ARRAY<Float>, l2 ARRAY<Float>);
INSERT INTO example_arrays (id, l1, l2) VALUES (1, ARRAY[1.0, 2.0, 3.0], ARRAY[4.0, 5.0, 6.0]);
SELECT array_dot_product(l1, l2) AS dot_product FROM example_arrays WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE example_arrays SET l2 = ARRAY[7.0, 8.0, 9.0] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT array_dot_product(l1, l2) AS new_dot_product FROM example_arrays WHERE id = 1;
